metaDescription: Need a gas engineer in London and Sussex? Book a Gas Safe engineer for boiler work, gas safety checks, fault finding and landlord support.
h1: Gas Engineer in London and Sussex
intro: We provide Gas Safe engineering support across London and Sussex for boiler repairs, gas safety checks, landlord work and general fault finding where safe diagnosis and clear advice matter.
pricingGuidance: Gas engineer visits are quoted around the type of work needed, whether that is diagnosis, servicing, safety inspection or follow-up repair.
localProof: Booked by homeowners and landlords who need one point of contact for gas safety, heating faults and day-to-day boiler issues.

sections.heading: What a local gas engineer can help with
sections.body: The work ranges from boiler diagnostics and servicing through to landlord gas safety certification and general gas appliance issues.

sections.heading: Why Gas Safe registration matters
sections.body: Gas work should be carried out by someone who is properly qualified and working within the right registration scope for the appliance or task involved.

sections.heading: Practical support for homes and rentals
sections.body: We work with owner-occupied homes, rental properties and managed buildings where access, communication and timing often matter as much as the repair itself.
